reviews.review_description: Here me out this game I play non stop my mom asks me to come off and I would just say later cause how fun it is!. So I would love to help the community and be a moderator for this game
The game is fun. The moderators are helpful. The 5 year old kids are annoying. Just like any gorilla tag rip off but better

The Best Fan game of Gorilla Tag, There are daily updates more than Capuchin and Gorilla tag, Which is cool, I like when its Fan art sections that people make fan arts! Possibly i will rate this game 10/10 of being moderator

I like this game with how there is a fan art section for peoples work to go and that there is zero gravity a restricted area and a shop i like how the mod vents are everywhere so you can get to places if your a mod faster so anyways i like everything about this game and hope to see more updates!
I like the music and the maps are really fun and a will made game

reviews.review_title: Best fan game made ever listen why?
reviews.review_description: This is one of the best gtag fan made games been playing since it first came out and it’s really cool I like how there’s fan art and all that I have an idea try to add mile track like it sounds dum but you know a track that people race on add that in this game and we could race just think about it your running a marathon on vr it would be fun or add a new map I think a horror would be nice but have a good day and hope you add this bye :)
